Smart Charging Planner – Battery Charge: Smart Charging Planner – Battery Charge Target Calculation
enableSmartChargingNotification: Send Daily Charging Plan via Telegram
Electricity contract number, leave empty: Electricity contract number, leave empty for auto-discovery
Target time for weekday charging, e.g. 0: Target time for weekday charging, e.g. 07:00

AI-based battery charging decisions usin: AI-based battery charging decisions using weather forecast and PV production
brightsky adapter instance, e.g. brights: brightsky adapter instance, e.g. brightsky.0 (Deutscher Wetterdienst)
Anthropic Claude API key for AI decision: Anthropic Claude API key for AI decisions
Maximum AC charging power from grid in k: Maximum AC charging power from grid in kW
Use historical data from History adapter: Use historical data from History adapter for better decisions
Calculate daily battery charge target ba: Calculate daily battery charge target based on PV forecast and pricing
Daily calculation time, e.g. 22:00 (befo: Daily calculation time, e.g. 22:00 (before cheap night phase)
Average household consumption in kW (fal: Average household consumption in kW (fallback without historical data)
Min. PV output per hour for solar suffic: Min. PV output per hour for solar sufficiency (fallback)
ioBroker state with battery SOC from evc: ioBroker state with battery SOC from evcc (JSON object with .soc field, e.g. evcc.0.status.battery)
ioBroker state with current PV power fro: ioBroker state with current PV power from evcc, must be logged by history adapter
ioBroker state with home power consumpti: ioBroker state with home power consumption from evcc, must be logged

Share of historical average PV credited: Share of historical average PV credited (0.75 = 75%)
Send daily charging plan summary via Tel: Send daily charging plan summary via Telegram
Alert when smart charging is not active: Alert when smart charging is not active after configured time with low vehicle SOC
Alert threshold for vehicle state of cha: Alert threshold for vehicle state of charge
Telegram adapter instance for notificati: Telegram adapter instance for notifications, e.g. telegram.0

claude_api_key_tip: 💡 Tip: After saving, the API key is automatically tested on the next AI run. Check the logs for success or error messages.
ai_decision_tip: 💡 Multiple decision times recommended: brightsky provides only 13h forecast. Recommended: 06:00 and 17:30.
smart_charging_desc: Calculates the optimal daily battery charge target for the cheap electricity phase so the battery lasts until solar production is sufficient. Requires brightsky adapter and PV/battery configuration (above).
evcc_requirement_note: ⚠️ Prerequisite: In evcc under Settings → Experimental → enable 'Show experimental features', then test Battery → Grid charging → Price limit manually once.
